students.name: Cassidy
students.studentUnderstandings: Cassidy participated in our fraction number line session today. They helped explain how to partition a number line into halves and worked on labeling fractions correctly. Cassidy contributed to identifying that four halves equals two wholes and shared their thinking when discussing the placement of fractions on the number line.

students.name: Bristol
students.studentUnderstandings: Bristol worked with fractions on a number line in today's session. They served as the writer for one activity and offered ideas about denominators when labeling fractions. Bristol participated in skip counting by halves and identifying equivalent fractions during our collaborative work.

students.name: Leighton
students.studentUnderstandings: Leighton engaged with fraction concepts using a number line today. They suggested using blocks to create equal spaces when partitioning and helped adjust Anna's number line to show the correct placement for one whole. Leighton contributed to counting spaces and determining denominators in our fraction work.

internalFeedback.lessonTitle: Cignition: Fractions on a Number Line (3.NF.A.2)
